meta.title: Herbert London on America's Policy in Afghanistan
meta.description: Hudson Institute President Herbert London discusses America's policy in Afghanistan. General McCrystal has laid out a plan that requires 40,000 additional troops and the United States would then engage in a counter-insurgency as opposed to a counter-terrorist activity.
